top_signals.title: PHP/USD: Philippine Peso Declines to Match Record Low on Higher Oil Prices
top_signals.summary: The Philippine central bank intervened in the foreign-exchange market to support the peso, which fell to a record low.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Norway's Oil Output Beats Forecasts as Hormuz Traffic Stays Near Crisis Lows
top_signals.summary: Norway's crude oil production beat official forecasts in June as offshore fields returned from seasonal maintenance, delivering a stronger-than-expected increase in supply at a time when global markets remain focused on disruptions to Middle Eastern exports. According to preliminary figures released Tuesday by the Norwegian Offshore Directorate (SODIR), Norway's crude oil production averaged 1.827 million barrels per day (bpd) in June, exceeding the agency's official forecast while rising sharply from 1.677 million bpd in the same month last year.…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: FTSE 100 Live: Stocks edge up; inflation eases in boost for Healey
top_signals.summary: Welcome back to the City AM FTSE 100 liveblog. It’s Wednesday and new Chancellor John Healey secured an early boost after the Office for National Statistics (ONS) revealed that inflation slowed in June. Headline CPI inflation dipped from 2.8 per cent in May to 2.6 per cent in June. Grant Fitzner, chief economist at the [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Satsuma shareholders approve bitcoin treasury liquidation and London delisting
top_signals.summary: The vote comes less than a year after UK-based Satsuma Technology raised $218 million to pursue its bitcoin strategy.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Diplomacy shifts faster than clean energy supply chains can be built
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Germany to study French cooperation offer on SAMP/T air-defense system
top_signals.summary: German government leaders will study an offer by French President Emmanuel Macron to cooperate on the French-Italian SAMP/T air defense system.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Arc Joins the Maritime Battery Forum to Expand Electric Propulsion Solutions to Commercial Vessels
top_signals.summary: The Maritime Battery Forum (MBF) has welcomed Arc, a U.S.-based marine technology company developing integrated electric and hybrid-electric propulsion systems, as the newest member of its global community of maritime battery enablers. Arc designs its battery systems…
